content: صَدَر حُكم ضِدَّه وَ هُوَ خَارِجُ الْبِلَاد
translations: eng:They imposed a sentence against him while he was outside the country

transcriptions.arabizi: sadar hukmadidd|uh wa huwa chaarig ilbilaed
